page_metadata.bioconda__summary: pyfaidx: efficient pythonic random access to fasta subsequences
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: This python module implements pure python classes for indexing, retrieval, and in-place modification of fasta files using a samtools compatible index.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: This python module implements pure Python classes for indexing, retrieval, and in-place modification of FASTA files using a samtools compatible index.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This python module implements pure Python classes for indexing, retrieval, and in-place modification of FASTA files using a samtools compatible index.
